name: get_schedule_time_blocks
description: Retrieves all time blocks for a specific heating schedule in a zone. Returns the detailed schedule blocks including start/end times, temperature setpoints, and heating mode (on/off) for each time period configured in the selected schedule timetable. Used to display and manage individual time blocks within a heating schedule.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home installation

timetable_id.description: The unique identifier of the schedule timetable (e.g., 1, 2) to retrieve time blocks for

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone/room
